testcase.name: test_client_login

failure.message: AssertionError: No access_token in response assert 'access_token' in {'token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoiYzk5ZDExYmUtZDU0ZS00ZjA5LWFiZDEtMDVhZTM0YTkzM2NiIiwidXNlcl90eXBlIjoiY2xpZW50IiwiZXhwIjoxNzY5NzM0MTQ5LjM1Mzk2Nn0.QKYSse4ufb7VKX3_dnGaD4IZ0Mtxk2BxMSOaGRF0Xik', 'user': {'cashback_balance': 25.5, 'city': 'Lausanne', 'created_at': '2026-01-21T22:57:48.357Z', 'email': 'test@example.com', ...}}

testcase.failure: tests/test_client_dashboard.py:30: in test_client_login assert "access_token" in data, "No access_token in response" E AssertionError: No access_token in response E assert 'access_token' in {'token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoiYzk5ZDExYmUtZDU0ZS00ZjA5LWFiZDEtMDVhZTM0YTkzM2NiIiwidXNlcl90eXBlIjoiY2xpZW50IiwiZXhwIjoxNzY5NzM0MTQ5LjM1Mzk2Nn0.QKYSse4ufb7VKX3_dnGaD4IZ0Mtxk2BxMSOaGRF0Xik', 'user': {'cashback_balance': 25.5, 'city': 'Lausanne', 'created_at': '2026-01-21T22:57:48.357Z', 'email': 'test@example.com', ...}}
